stemHtml: Which of these statements concerning propellers is correct?

options.a: An unfeathered propeller causes less drag than a feathered propeller.
options.b: The blade angle of a feathered propeller is approximately 0 degrees.
options.c: A windmilling propeller causes less drag than a feathered propeller.
options.d: The blade angle of a feathered propeller is approximately 90 degrees.
